step_rationale: Produces NO for endothelial function and vasculoprotection; impairment indicates endothelial dysfunction.
mechanism: Endothelial NOS catalyzes NO production essential for vasodilation and platelet inhibition; dysfunction contributes to endothelial erosion and thrombosis.
